summary: Successfully built portable .exe for Usage Tracker. The packaged app at dist/win-unpacked/Usage Tracker.exe will show 'Usage Tracker' in Windows taskbar instead of 'Electron' because it runs from a properly named executable. Taskbar overlay displays percentage number as colored circle with white text. System tray tooltip shows 'Usage Tracker' with usage details.
current_status: Packaged app built and launched - Ready for testing
features_implemented: App name shows as 'Usage Tracker' in taskbar (not Electron)
Taskbar overlay with percentage text on colored badge
Window title updates with percentage and reset time
next_steps: Test the running app to verify taskbar shows correct name
Optionally build NSIS installer for distribution
